info.english_meaning: to churn to shake to stir to striketo agitate to splash
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: viloqanaM pratiGAtaH' iti kOmudI  viloqanaM kzoBaRam iti mA.DA.vfttiH  ayaM dvikarmakaH  'hiMsAsaMkleSayormanTet maTenmaTnAti loqane' (Slo. 98) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tvAmagne puzkarAdaDyaTarvA niramanTata' (tE0 saM0 351134) manTanena tato nizkfzyAlaBata
'yadu dugDaniDiM nimaTya devErmfdusAraH samakarzi pUrRacandraH sa baBUva kfSo viyogatapteSvaramUrDozmaparikzaracCarIraH' (skanda0 kA0 4445).. nimaTya nitarAM maTitvA
'utpAwyata ivAtyarTaM netraM nirmaTyate taTA Siraso'rDaM tu taM vidyAdaDimanTaM svalakzaREH' (suSrute)..
